title: Bindiya Chamkegi
subTitle: Bindiya Chamkegi

title: Mera Balam Thanedaar
subTitle: A teenage girl who believes in supporting lies for benevolent reasons marries a duty-driven police officer under unfortunate circumstances in the state of Rajasthan, India.

title: Parineetii
subTitle: Parineet confesses her love to Rajeev while he is still unconscious. After hearing her voice, he miraculously wakes up.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
subTitle: Harman intervenes after seeing Surbhi getting harassed by one of his friends. Saya asks Preeto for help.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
subTitle: Harman intervenes after seeing Surbhi getting harassed by one of his friends. Saya asks Preeto for help.

title: Parineetii
subTitle: Parineet confesses her love to Rajeev while he is still unconscious. After hearing her voice, he miraculously wakes up.

title: Jai Jagannath
subTitle: Following the cessation of the Kurukshetra War, Lord Krishna arrives in Dwarka to find turmoil and disarray. He then strives to re-establish harmony and faith.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Ryder and the PAW Patrol need to rescue Alex on Jake's mountain, and the pups find strange footprints in the snow on the mountain outside Adventure Bay.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Mr Porter's van full of puppy food slides on the ice near the shore, and Katie and her cat are on a stranded chair lift, leaving them with no way down.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: The PAW Patrol joins Alex and Mr Porter at their campsite and teaches them how to safely build and extinguish a camp fire. While rescuing Chickaletta from the top of City Hall, the pups notice that it has been decorated for a big celebration.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: A winter ice storm causes trouble throughout Adventure Bay and Mayor Goodway challenges Mayor Humdinger's basketball team to a game.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Alex sets up his own mini-patrol, recruiting Chickaletta, Cali, Turtle, and Bunny. Alex loses his first tooth and then misplaces it.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: The pups fly to the Arctic in order to rescue lost polar bear cubs, and the Patrol needs to find lost sheep and learn who has been making holes in a fence.

title: Motu Patlu
subTitle: Best friends Motu and Patlu live in Furfuri Nagar. When they land in the most hilarious situations, Motu is the one who generally creates problems, while Patlu tries to solve them.

title: Motu Patlu
subTitle: Motu learns forgiveness, but his newfound tolerance sets a dangerous thief free. Can he make up for his mistake?

title: Khatra Khatra Khatra
subTitle: Bharti is surprised to find Harsh and Aditya dressed as ascetics. Later, popular dancer Sapna Choudhary makes everyone dance to her tunes.

title: Salaam-E-Ishq
subTitle: Aaliya and Zain are forced to get married to each other. However, they don't have any feelings for each other, except hatred.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
subTitle: Prem tells Simar that he doesn't trust her and has only returned for the pooja. Later, Prem leaves angrily and Roli tries to console Simar.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
subTitle: Soumya's decision to vote for Kareena as the next Guru Maa shocks everyone. Harman and Surbhi worry as Soumya go missing.

title: Sindoor Ek Vachan
subTitle: Shantanu, a man of conviction who lives life according to his own principles, crosses paths with Poorna, who alters both his way of life and his worldview.

title: Shakti Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki
subTitle: Soumya's decision to vote for Kareena as the next Guru Maa shocks everyone. Harman and Surbhi worry as Soumya go missing.

title: Suman Indori
subTitle: Forced to marry a rich, shrewd politician, kind-hearted Suman adjusts to her new reality whilst dealing with a sister-in-law who harbours ambitions of being the head of the household.

title: Parineetii
subTitle: Rakesh's men infiltrate the hospital and plan to use a lethal injection to kill him once and for all, but Parineet shows up before them.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Ryder and the PAW Patrol team help to rescue a lost kitty. Ryder, Rubble, and Rocky call in Chase to help them free Katie and Cali's train which has become trapped by a rock slide.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Some cows escape from a train at the railway station and must be rounded up. Alex wants to help rescue Cali the cat from farmer Yumi's barn.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: When Mandy the monkey escapes from her cage on the train, Ryder and the PAW Patrol are led on a wild chase. During a bad windstorm, Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to save an Owl trapped in a blown over tree and reunite her with her baby.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Skye and the pups must save a stunt pilot and her plane. The pups help Farmer Yumi prepare for her wedding day.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Cap'n Turbot and his cousin Francois get rescued. Chompy the Beaver takes a liking to the wood at Farmer Yumi's Farm.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: The pups must invade the Spider King's lair to rescue Apollo. Ryder and the others must rebuild a trapeze before a show.

title: PAW Patrol
subTitle: Ryder performs an incredible stunt during a rescue, inspiring a young boy to become a daredevil. Ryder entrusts the care of Adventure Bay to Robo-Dog while he and the pups have a holiday.

subTitle: Kareena orders her followers to lock Soumya up after she became the Guru Maa. Saya thinks Kareena is abusing her power and intervenes.

subTitle: Rajeev mentions that he is only at the venue for Parineet, and he later apologises to Neeti after informing her about his wedding to Parineet.

title: Khatra Khatra Khatra
subTitle: Celebrities pull off some goofy stunts on the 'Khatra Khatra Khatra' stage. From practical jokes to hilarious roasts and ribbing, they stop at nothing to bring the house down.

title: Ram Siya Ke Luv Kush
subTitle: Though Raavan lays down a stiff challenge to Ram, the latter's response leaves everyone present in a state of complete shock.

title: Naagin 6
subTitle: Three powerful shape-shifters reincarnate to finish and settle an age-old score.

title: Naagin 6
subTitle: Maha Sapera, the powerful master who has an ability to control all Naagins, shows up to help capture Pratha.

title: Sasural Simar Ka
subTitle: The Bharadwaj family is shocked when Meghna informs them that Shaurya is dead; Siddhant is shocked to learn about Shaurya upon returning home.

title: Laagi Tujhse Lagan
subTitle: Aai Saheb becomes terrified upon receiving a parcel containing photos of Nakusha's real appearance. Kalawati sets her plans in motion.

title: Balika Vadhu
subTitle: Anandi misses her in-laws, and Sumitra cannot stop crying for her. Madan Singh offers a large sum of money to the farmers.
